node.html: This plugin designed to inject a dose of inspiration, wisdom, or humor into your editing workflow. It delivers random quotes, proverbs, or jokes directly to your Neovim dashboard. Additionally, it offers helpful tips and tricks to improve your productivity and efficiency within the editor.
